# James Chang

Founder of Aleph Co. and senior product manager based in Los Angeles, CA.

## Positioning

Senior Product Manager and founder of Aleph Co. Currently running Aleph Compliance plus six other products in parallel — seven in total — from compliance SaaS to an AI trading experiment. Fifteen years of global supply-chain and sourcing experience preceded the PM career; that background is the foundation of Aleph Compliance.

## Current work

- **Aleph Compliance** (alephco.io) — SaaS platform for US importers covering FDA FSVP, CPSIA/CPC, California Prop 65, and multi-state PFAS regulations. Founder.
- **Bahtzang Trader** (bahtzang.com) — AI trading-decision experiment using Claude Sonnet. Paper-trading sandbox, not a live trading service.
- **TableDrop** — restaurant reservation marketplace. Next.js + Stripe + Playwright.
- **The Fantastic Leagues** (thefantasticleagues.com) — fantasy baseball platform with league-context AI (Gemini + Claude).
- **The Judge Tool** (thejudgetool.com) — digital KCBS BBQ competition judging platform.
- **Tastemakers** — iOS restaurant-review app, cross-platform build. Currently paused.
- **The Thirsty Pig** (thirstypig.com) — food & travel blog since 2007. 2026 rebuild archived 923 posts from the Wayback Machine + 1,649 Instagram posts.

## Previous roles

- Gannett / LocaliQ / USA Today Network — Senior Product Manager (2022–2024). Shipped Scheduling product 0→1 to 4,900 users in year one.
- Sunrise Integration — Project Manager (2020)
- Movley — Operations & Product Manager (2019)
- MEDL Mobile — Product / Project Manager (2018)
- Earlier supply-chain / sourcing roles at YETI Coolers, AT&T Wireless, Cheng Loong Corporation (Shanghai), Cobalt Skys, Spray Technologies, Breeze Digital Technology (Taipei/Shenzhen).

## Education & credentials

- MBA, USC Marshall School of Business, 2012. Class President.
- Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO), Scrum Alliance, 2019.
- Product Management Certificate, Product School, 2018.
